view.blocked.description: Blocked accounts cannot reply in your threads, mention you, or otherwise interact with you. You will not see their content and they will be prevented from seeing yours.
view.error.generic: Something went wrong, please try again
view.hint.updateLater: You can update this later from your settings.
view.home.label.exploreFeeds: View your feeds and explore more
view.lists.empty.description: Lists allow you to see content from your favorite people.
view.lists.empty.none: You haven't created any lists yet.
view.lists.empty.title: No lists
view.lists.error.fetch: There was an issue fetching the list. Tap here to try again.
view.lists.label.modlistDescription: Public, sharable lists of users to mute or block in bulk.
view.muted.description: Muted accounts have their posts removed from your feed and from your notifications. Mutes are completely private.
view.postThread.empty.quotes: Nobody has quoted this yet. Maybe you should be the first!
view.postThread.empty.reposts: Nobody has reposted this yet. Maybe you should be the first!
view.starterPacks.description: Starter Packs let you share your favorite feeds and people with your friends.
